text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: "The Tenacious Tracen Cutie Collection"... You want me to be a part of this article?

text_block_list.name: Magazine Writer
text_block_list.text:
You've been drawing a lot of attention these days
with the determined way you run.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I'm... incredibly honored by the offer, however...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
(Can I really present myself in a way suitable for a
teen magazine?)

text_block_list.name: Magazine Writer
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, my daughter really looks up to you!
She says it's so awe-inspiring seeing you win after
all the hard work you've put in.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Your daughter said that?

text_block_list.name: Magazine Writer
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And it's not just her. A growing
number of people on social media say you inspire
them too.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: People look up to... and are inspired by me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...I see.
In that case, I'm happy to do an interview.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So that's why you asked us to teach you how to be cute!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. Out of all the students in Tracen,
they specifically chose me. I would like to do
everything I can to meet their expectations.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Curren, people call you the missionary for all
things cute and Fine, you're widely beloved by
the people of Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I decided to speak with you both, as I cannot
think of anyone more appropriate to ask for the
help I need.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you're sure you want my help, then I'm happy to
be of service! Although I'm not sure what I can
teach you about being cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Why don't we just do what we usually
do? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#studying #cuteness with #Ikuno in #CuteTown ☆
There, that should do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... The rainbow parfaits are nice, but these
new animal crepes might be better for a group
selfie...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I see. One must consider many factors in order to
make the most attractive picture, from coloring
to shape to potential popularity.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there, little guys! ♪ I've never seen
such specimens, even back in Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm. So I must never let my smile falter, no matter
who or what I'm speaking to...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Over here! ♪ Let's get a shot of all three of us in
front of this field of flowers!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Sure.
I must calculate how to make the picture as
visually appealing as possible and keep a
constant smile.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm... After analyzing the cuteness factor, I think I
achieved some measure of success. However, I
still feel a lingering awkwardness in myself.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If either of you sees anything strange about me or
anything I can improve on from your perspective,
please point it out to me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no way. Don't tell me you haven't noticed,
Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've already blown me away with your
cuteness! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness is the language of feelings. And when
cuteness interacts with cuteness, the whole world
will fill up with cuteness! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
By working so hard to understand cuteness,
you've communicated the greatest kind of
cuteness! It's made me even cuter just by seeing
it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She's right! I felt your cuteness with perfect clarity
while watching you do your best!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their own kind of cuteness... And
yours is just wonderful, Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Ikuno Dictus tries her hand at
the magazine interview.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Look at this! It reads, "Cute and hardworking, the fruits of Ikuno Dictus's studies are evident in her flawless execution of a heart pose."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you're trending on Umatter too! ♪ It looks
like your cuteness came through loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I worked incredibly hard at it, so I'm
glad that people have accepted me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness is something both fun and joyful... You
two were the ones who taught me that.
